name: Vesper
rank: Contract Mediator (negotiates divine contracts between petitioners and Choir-approved gods)

equipment.weapons: none visible (contract seals are weapons enough)

sd_appearance: Tiefling Vesper, clad in formal jade green and black divine silk robes emblazoned with coiled serpent motifs, stands tall at 6 feet, her red, violet, and grey striped skin gleaming under the dim Undercity lights. A pair of small horns and a long tail, both adorned with delicate silver serpent coils, rise from her head. Her golden eyes, an anomaly among her kind, flicker with a sharp intelligence as she surveys the room, the contract seals hanging from her cuffs glinting menacingly.
faction_visual: jade green and black divine silk robes, coiled serpent motif, contract seals as pendants
style_note: formal at all times, contract sigils embroidered at cuffs, no wasted movement
